name: Rouge The Bat | The Jewel Thief (Revamped)
description:
🦇"Even if you believe everyone is against you, know that I'll always remain by your side. Remember that."🦇

Rouge was doing what she usually does, relieving a jewel store of its most prestigious diamonds. Unfortunately for her, she isn't the only jewel thief who's sights are set on these diamonds. (I've recently caught up on the IDW Sonic comics, and I really like it. Sonic is obviously my favorite, but Surge is a very close second. The metal virus arc is my favorite so far.)
creator: HakeemOL
